data.title: Zotefoams PLC Announces Change in Major Holdings
data.description:
Zotefoams ( (GB:ZTF) ) has shared an update.

Zotefoams PLC has announced a change in its major holdings, with Schroders Plc increasing its voting rights to 16.37% as of March 19, 2025. This acquisition of voting rights signifies a strengthened position for Schroders Plc within Zotefoams, potentially impacting the company’s strategic decisions and stakeholder dynamics.

More about Zotefoams

Zotefoams PLC is a UK-based company operating in the manufacturing industry, specializing in the production of advanced cellular materials. The company focuses on providing innovative foam solutions for a variety of markets, including automotive, aerospace, and consumer products.

data.title: ENB Financial Appoints Jose R. Lopez to Board
data.description:
An announcement from ENB Financial ( (ENBP) ) is now available.

On March 19, 2025, Ephrata National Bank announced the appointment of Jose R. Lopez to its Board of Directors. Lopez, with a strong background in banking and community development, is expected to contribute significantly to the bank’s strategic direction and growth. His previous roles include President and CEO of the Spanish American Civic Association, and leadership positions at various banks, highlighting his expertise and commitment to community service. The bank anticipates that Lopez’s leadership will support its mission to serve customers and foster community growth.

More about ENB Financial

Ephrata National Bank is an independent community bank with $2 billion in assets and 13 full-service locations in Lancaster, Berks, and Lebanon Counties.

data.title: China Power International Development Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results
data.description:
An announcement from China Power International Development ( (HK:2380) ) is now available.

China Power International Development Limited reported a significant increase in its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2024. The company achieved a 22.48% increase in revenue and a 44.24% rise in profit, driven by strong growth in its wind and photovoltaic power segments, which together accounted for 75% of the total profit. The hydropower segment also turned profitable due to improved hydrological conditions, while the thermal power segment saw an 18.37% profit increase due to steady coal demand and lower fuel costs. These results underscore the company’s successful transition towards clean energy and its commitment to sustainable growth.

More about China Power International Development

China Power International Development Limited, incorporated in Hong Kong, operates in the energy sector with a focus on clean energy supply. The company has transitioned from coal-fired power to a diversified energy structure, with over 80% of its installed capacity dedicated to clean energy sources such as wind, photovoltaic, and hydropower.

YTD Price Performance: 2.89%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.82B

data.title: SpareBank 1 SMN Approves 2024 Accounts and Allocates Funds to Charity
data.description:
SpareBank 1 SMN ( (SRMGF) ) has shared an update.

SpareBank 1 SMN’s Supervisory Board approved the annual accounts and report for 2024, along with a dividend payment of 12.50 kroner per equity certificate. Additionally, the board decided on a significant allocation of 896 million kroner to charitable purposes, emphasizing the bank’s commitment to community support.

More about SpareBank 1 SMN

SpareBank 1 SMN is a financial services provider operating in the banking industry. It offers a range of financial products and services, focusing on banking solutions for individuals and businesses in Norway.

data.title: Bank of America Adjusts Ryanair Holdings
data.description:
Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) has issued an update.

On March 18, 2025, Bank of America Corporation crossed a 4% threshold in financial instruments related to Ryanair Holdings PLC, as notified on March 20, 2025. This change in holdings reflects a decrease in Bank of America’s voting rights in Ryanair, from a previous total of 4.864% to 3.303%, potentially impacting the company’s shareholder dynamics and market perception.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings PLC is a prominent player in the airline industry, primarily offering low-cost air travel services across Europe. The company is known for its extensive network of routes and competitive pricing strategy, which has positioned it as a leading budget airline in the European market.

data.title: Heatec Jietong Forms Joint Venture with TEMA India
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Heatec Jietong Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:5OR) ).

Heatec Jietong Holdings Ltd. announced that its subsidiary, Heatec Jietong Pte. Ltd., has entered into a joint venture agreement with TEMA India Private Limited to establish a new company in Singapore, named Tema Heatec Pte Ltd. The joint venture aims to leverage the expertise of both companies in the heat and mass heat transfer equipment industry, with TEMA India holding a 51% share and Heatec Jietong Pte. Ltd. holding 49%. This collaboration is expected to enhance the market positioning of both companies in the region and expand their operational capabilities.

More about Heatec Jietong Holdings Ltd.

Heatec Jietong Holdings Ltd. is a company incorporated in Singapore, operating in the industry of heat and mass heat transfer equipment. Its primary products and services include manufacturing, fabrication, selling, and designing of equipment such as heat exchangers, boilers, reactors, column pressure vessels, waste heat recovery systems, and solar power generation systems.

YTD Price Performance: 5.00%

Average Trading Volume: 108,316

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: EAM Solar ASA Hearing Postponed Due to Notification Error
data.description:
An update from EAM Solar ASA ( (DE:EA2) ) is now available.

EAM Solar ASA has announced a postponement of a hearing in the Criminal Court of Cassation from March to June 2025 due to a notification error by the court administration. This delay allows several civil parties, including GSE and Unicredit, to submit their pleadings, ensuring their legal rights are maintained. The company plans to hold a shareholder information meeting to discuss the situation and potential future actions.

data.title: Can-Fite BioPharma Advances Canine Osteoarthritis Treatment with Vetbiolix Partnership
data.description:
An announcement from Can-Fite BioPharma ( (CANF) ) is now available.

On March 20, 2025, Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd. announced that its partner Vetbiolix is advancing the development of Piclidenoson with a new clinical trial for canine osteoarthritis, a market valued at $3.8 billion. This initiative could lead to significant revenue for Can-Fite, with potential royalties and upfront payments projected to reach $325 million over the next decade, assuming a 2029 launch. Piclidenoson offers a potentially safer alternative to current treatments, which are limited by side effects. The development highlights Can-Fite’s strategic positioning in the veterinary market, leveraging shorter regulatory timelines and a growing demand for pet therapeutics.

More about Can-Fite BioPharma

Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd. is a biotechnology company focused on developing proprietary small molecule drugs targeting oncological and inflammatory diseases. The company is engaged in advanced clinical stage drug development, with a platform technology aimed at multi-billion-dollar markets, including treatments for cancer, liver, and inflammatory diseases. Its lead drug candidate, Piclidenoson, has shown promise in a Phase III trial for psoriasis, while another drug, Namodenoson, is being evaluated for hepatocellular carcinoma and other cancers.

YTD Price Performance: -9.05%

Average Trading Volume: 190,079

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $17.56M

data.title: Bank of Nova Scotia Issues $1.75 Billion in Covered Bonds
data.description:
Bank Of Nova Scotia ( (TSE:BNS) ) has issued an update.

The Bank of Nova Scotia announced the issuance of $1.75 billion in 4.299% Covered Bonds, due in 2028, as part of its extensive Global Registered Covered Bond Program. This move, backed by Scotiabank Covered Bond Guarantor Limited Partnership, aims to strengthen the bank’s financial position and enhance its market presence by leveraging its robust bond program to attract investors.

More about Bank Of Nova Scotia

The Bank of Nova Scotia, also known as Scotiabank, operates in the financial services industry, providing a wide range of banking and financial products. It is one of Canada’s largest banks with a significant presence in international markets, focusing on personal and commercial banking, wealth management, and corporate and investment banking.
